channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Man rescued alive after eight days trapped in collapsed Venezuela shopping mall
item.description: A man has been rescued alive in Venezuela after spending eight days trapped beneath the rubble of a collapsed shopping mall parking structure following a series of devastating earthquakes. Hernán Albe...

item.title: Utumishi Girls Academy reopens following dormitory fire tragedy that killed 16 students
item.description: Utumishi Girls Academy has officially resumed learning activities after a tragic dormitory fire that resulted in the death of 16 students. The incident, which has been described as a devastating arson...

item.title: GCC sets September 30 deadline for completing road cuts by utility departments in Chennai
item.description: The Greater Chennai Corporation (GCC) has announced that September 30 will be the final deadline for all road cutting works carried out by other service departments across the city. After this date, n...

item.title: Minegoziibe Anishinabe First Nation declares emergency amid severe flooding in Manitoba’s Parkland region
item.description: Minegoziibe Anishinabe First Nation, also known as Pine Creek First Nation, in Manitoba’s flood-affected Parkland region has declared a state of emergency after severe overland flooding damaged infras...

item.title: High Court declares Fort Hare’s deregistration of Oscar Mabuyane unlawful and procedurally unfair
item.description: The article by Mvusiwekhaya Sicwetsha reflects on a High Court ruling that found the University of Fort Hare’s decision to deregister Eastern Cape Premier Lubabalo Oscar Mabuyane in March 2021 to be u...

item.title: Meta Introduces Paid Subscription Plan for Advanced Smart Glasses Features
item.description: Meta is rolling out a new subscription model for its smart glasses, including Ray-Ban, Oakley, and Meta-branded devices, under a plan called Meta One Premium Plan. The subscription will unlock expande...

item.title: Azam FC U20 crowned NBC U20 Youth League champions as NBC reaffirms youth football investment
item.description: Azam FC U20 have been crowned champions of the 2025/26 NBC U20 Youth League after securing a hard-fought 2-1 victory over Young Africans SC (Yanga) U20 in the final played at the Azam Complex in Dar e...

item.title: AJK Supreme Court postpones hearing on Election Commission petition regarding PTI provisional registration
item.description: The Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) Supreme Court on Thursday deferred the hearing of an application filed by the Election Commission concerning the provisional registration of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (...

item.title: Scientists warn that massive satellite constellations could threaten astronomical observations and dark skies
item.description: European astronomers and space researchers have raised serious concerns about proposed large-scale satellite deployment plans led by companies associated with Elon Musk and other private space venture...

item.title: New US Ambassador Lee Lipton pledges stronger US-Philippines alliance and expanded cooperation
item.description: Newly appointed United States Ambassador to the Philippines Lee Lipton has expressed strong commitment to further strengthening the long-standing alliance between the United States and the Philippines...

item.title: Cape Verde’s remarkable rise and breakthrough performance at the FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Cape Verde, a small West African island nation with a population of just over half a million people, has emerged as one of the surprise success stories of the FIFA World Cup 2026. Despite its limited ...

item.title: Obituary: Dr. Michael Klein, physician and researcher who transformed maternity care by advocating for less intervention in childbirth
item.description: Dr. Michael Klein, a Canadian family physician, researcher and influential advocate for more natural childbirth practices, has died on June 10 in Roberts Creek, British Columbia. He was 86. Over a car...

item.title: Kakamega woman suspected of killing husband in milk dispute, family dispute and prior mediation revealed
item.description: A 59-year-old woman from Kakamega County is reportedly on the run after allegedly killing her 62-year-old husband following a domestic dispute involving milk. According to reports from local sources, ...

item.title: Tanzania Tourism Ministry launches discounted travel packages at Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair
item.description: The Ministry of Natural Resources and Tourism in Tanzania has introduced special discounted tourism packages at the 50th Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (DITF), also known as Sabasaba. The init...

item.title: Venezuela earthquake rescue: survivor found after eight days amid rising death toll
item.description: In Venezuela, rescuers achieved a remarkable breakthrough when they pulled a 43-year-old man alive from the rubble of a collapsed building eight days after powerful twin earthquakes struck the country...

item.title: Attendee at political state fair uses baptismal pool for relief during extreme heatwave
item.description: An attendee at a political-themed state fair linked to President Donald Trump sought relief from extreme heat by entering a baptismal pool set up at a religious tent during a severe heatwave affecting...

item.title: Sixteen killed and dozens injured in N1 bus crash near Touwsriver
item.description: A serious road accident on the N1 near Touwsriver in the Western Cape has claimed the lives of sixteen people and left many others injured. According to the Road Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC),...

item.title: National gun buyback scheme stalls as states refuse to sign on by deadline
item.description: A federal deadline for states and territories to commit to a proposed national gun buyback scheme has expired, exposing deep divisions between jurisdictions and casting doubt over the rollout of the r...

item.title: Groups urge Supreme Court to decide BARMM districting petitions ahead of 2026 parliamentary elections
item.description: A group from the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) has once again called on the Supreme Court to urgently resolve pending petitions related to the region’s first parliamentary el...

item.title: US policy shifts and Chinese battery dominance shape the rise of Slate’s low-cost electric truck
item.description: The article examines how changes in U.S. policy and global battery supply chains have influenced the development of Slate’s new low-cost electric vehicle. Slate, a Michigan-based startup, recently unv...
